data.title: Hang Seng rolls out physical gold ETF with tokenization option, unit records on public blockchains, pending regulatory approval. No secondary market trading.
data.description: Hang Seng is preparing to introduce tokenized units for a gold fund on public blockchains. However, the offering is contingent on regulatory clearance and will not be available for trading on secondary markets.

data.title: Novel TYK2 inhibitor Soficitinib shows promising safety and efficacy in treating moderate-to-severe AD patients, per JAMA Dermatology.
data.description: Soficitinib, a new medication, showed promising results in both safety and effectiveness for individuals with moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis (AD). The drug exhibited a positive safety profile and encouraging efficacy rates in clinical trials. These findings suggest that Soficitinib could be a beneficial treatment option for patients with AD, offering hope for improved outcomes in this population.

data.title: Jerome Powell warns successors to 'Stay out of elected politics' as Fed holds federal funds rate at 3.50%-3.75%.
data.description: Federal Reserve Chair, Jerome Powell, known for his restrained and firm approach, faced questions about his future and a Justice Department investigation after the Fed's policy meeting where the federal funds rate was held at 3.50%-3.75%. Powell advised the next chair to stay out of elected politics. He has dealt with challenges such as the pandemic panic, inflation surges, and White House pressure during his eight-year tenure. Powell, an unconventional choice for the position in 2017, lacks a PhD in economics and came from outside the Fed's usual academic background. His message remains focused on economic stability rather than political grandstanding.

data.title: E3 Lithium Ltd. (TSXV: ETL) provides update on Clearwater Project after successful 2025; key milestones achieved.
data.description: E3 Lithium Ltd., a prominent player in Canadian lithium development, has shared promising updates on its Clearwater Project for 2026 after achieving significant milestones in 2025. The company, listed on TSXV as ETL, FSE as OW3, and OTCQX as EEMMF, reached pivotal goals last year, including establishing and running a Demonstration Facility. This led to the successful production of battery-grade lithium carbonate and the commencement of their co endeavors.

data.title: Sungrow releases PowerTitan 3.0 for Europe's energy transition. Liquid-cooled system for utility-scale applications.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in Madrid, Sungrow introduced PowerTitan 3.0, its latest liquid-cooled energy storage system designed for utility-scale use in Europe. The renowned PV inverter and energy storage system supplier aims to cater to the region's increasing energy transition efforts. The system is tailored for large-scale applications and marks a significant advancement in Sungrow’s offerings for the European market.

data.title: Kyckr's report shows 68% of FCA UK AML fines tied to poor data quality, highlighting the importance of data accuracy.
data.description: In London, a recent report by Kyckr, a global company registry data provider, uncovered that 68% of Anti-Money Laundering fines imposed by the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) in the UK were linked to data inadequacies. This highlights the significance of accurate and comprehensive data in regulatory compliance.

data.title: AI startup Meet-Ting, backed by Google, launches availability agent to prep calendars for AI scheduling.
data.description: A new availability agent has been introduced by Meet-Ting, which is an AI startup supported by Google. This new tool is designed to streamline calendar preparation in anticipation of the increasing reliance on AI scheduling and agents worldwide. Meet-Ting's innovative solution aims to enhance efficiency and organization in scheduling processes.

data.title: Dassault Systèmes announces 3DEXPERIENCE World in Houston from Feb 1-4, gathering thousands of users to explore AI in design and manufacturing.
data.description: VELIZY-VILLACOUBLAY, France--Dassault Systèmes revealed today that the upcoming 3DEXPERIENCE World event is set to be held in Houston from February 1st to 4th. This annual gathering will bring together numerous SOLIDWORKS and 3DEXPERIENCE platform users to delve into the advancements in design to manufacturing processes. The event will delve into the realms of 3D UNIV+RSES and artificial intelligence, focusing on their pivotal roles in fostering creativity and innovation. Notable speakers include Jensen Huang, the founder and CEO of NVIDIA, and Pablos Holman, a renowned hacker.

data.title: Roland and Musical Futures International launch the Roland ASPIRE Project to teach electronic music in classrooms, active in Bangkok, Melbourne, and Singapore.
data.description: Roland Corporation and Musical Futures International have collaborated to launch the Roland ASPIRE Project in Sydney. This initiative focuses on electronic music education and aims to facilitate hands-on music creation using user-friendly hardware in classroom environments. The program is tailored for educators from diverse musical backgrounds, emphasizing practical music-making rather than technical expertise. Currently operational in Bangkok, Melbourne, and Singapore, the project is designed to enhance music education experiences for students in these regions.

data.title: Meta plans to spend $115-$135 billion in 2026 on AI, aiming to support 'Meta Superintelligence Labs'. This amount can cover 90 NFL stadiums at $1.5 billion each and fund 10 James Webb Telescopes. Mark Zuckerberg bets big on 'superintelligence'.
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) is increasing its focus on artificial intelligence (AI) with its largest capital expenditure plan yet for fiscal 2026. During the fourth-quarter earnings call, CFO Susan Li stated that the company is expecting capital expenditures for 2026 to range between $115 billion and $135 billion. A significant portion of this investment will support the efforts of Meta Superintelligence Labs. CEO Mark Zuckerberg emphasized the company's commitment to developing "personal superintelligence" by continuing to invest heavily in infrastructure for training advanced models. To provide context, $135 billion could cover the cost of building over 90 NFL stadiums at an average cost of $1.5 billion each. Additionally, this amount could fund the deployment of 10 more NASA James Webb Telescopes into space and is sufficient to operate an entire state.

data.title: New Earth Resources joins Critical Minerals Institute, a global organization focusing on critical minerals sector.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on January 29, 2026, New Earth Resources Corp. (CSE: EATH) revealed its new affiliation with the Critical Minerals Institute (CMI), an international entity dedicated to enhancing understanding, partnership, and prospects within the critical minerals industry.

data.title: "Pride This Way" vodcast launched by Pillars of Change Media, offering immersive travel and culture experiences globally.
data.description: In the UK, Soraya, a Pride icon, is transforming perceptions of queer joy and resilience. Pillars of Change Media introduced the debut of Pride This Way, a travel and culture podcast, on January 29, 2026. The podcast aims to be an essential guide for global travelers seeking immersive experiences.
